faqs.question: How to create a bot and get its token?
faqs.answer:
**Step 1:** Go to https://discord.com/developers/applications
**Step 2:** Click **New Application** and give it a name
**Step 3:** Go to the **Bot** tab on the left
**Step 4:** Click **Add Bot** and confirm
**Step 5:** Under **Token**, click **Reset Token** and copy it
**Step 6:** Save this token securely - you'll need it when adding the bot!

faqs.question: How to get a bot's Client ID?
faqs.answer:
**Step 1:** Go to https://discord.com/developers/applications
**Step 2:** Click on your bot application
**Step 3:** Go to the **OAuth2** tab
**Step 4:** Copy the **Client ID** at the top

Alternatively, you can find it in the **General Information** tab as **Application ID**.

faqs.question: How to get a Discord Server ID?
faqs.answer:
**Step 1:** Enable Developer Mode in Discord:
- User Settings → App Settings → Advanced → Enable Developer Mode

**Step 2:** Right-click on your server icon
**Step 3:** Click **Copy Server ID** at the bottom

faqs.question: How to reset a bot token?
faqs.answer:
**Step 1:** Go to https://discord.com/developers/applications
**Step 2:** Click on your bot application
**Step 3:** Go to the **Bot** tab
**Step 4:** Under **Token**, click **Reset Token**
**Step 5:** Confirm the reset
**Step 6:** Copy the new token immediately

⚠️ **Warning:** Resetting the token will invalidate the old one, and you'll need to update it everywhere the bot is running!

faqs.question: How to invite a bot to a server?
faqs.answer:
**Step 1:** Go to https://discord.com/developers/applications
**Step 2:** Click on your bot application
**Step 3:** Go to the **OAuth2** → **URL Generator** tab
**Step 4:** Select **bot** and **applications.commands** scopes
**Step 5:** Select the permissions your bot needs
**Step 6:** Copy the generated URL and open it in your browser
**Step 7:** Select your server and authorize the bot

faqs.question: How to enable bot intents?
faqs.answer:
**Step 1:** Go to https://discord.com/developers/applications
**Step 2:** Click on your bot application
**Step 3:** Go to the **Bot** tab
**Step 4:** Scroll down to **Privileged Gateway Intents**
**Step 5:** Enable the intents your bot needs:
- **Presence Intent** - See user status
- **Server Members Intent** - Access member lists
- **Message Content Intent** - Read message content

⚠️ **Note:** These require verification if your bot is in 100+ servers.
